evals.prompt: I'm starting a new React project with TypeScript and Vite. Can you create an AGENT.md file for it? I want to use Tailwind CSS for styling and Vitest for testing.
evals.expected_output: AGENT.md file with React/TypeScript/Vite setup, Tailwind CSS conventions, Vitest testing commands, and appropriate boundaries

evals.prompt: Create an AGENT.md for my Python FastAPI project. I use PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, and pytest. The project has user authentication and CRUD endpoints.
evals.expected_output: AGENT.md file with FastAPI/Python setup, PostgreSQL/SQLAlchemy commands, pytest testing, authentication boundaries, and CRUD patterns

evals.prompt: I have a monorepo with a React frontend and Node.js backend. Help me set up AGENT.md files for both.
evals.expected_output: Multiple AGENT.md files - root level with shared instructions, frontend-specific AGENT.md, and backend-specific AGENT.md with nested structure guidance
